message:
feat(runtime): gate CrosstermEventSource behind crossterm-compat feature

Move CrosstermEventSource and its TerminalSession import behind a
crossterm-compat feature flag so the runtime crate can compile without
crossterm for headless, wasm32, and test scenarios.

Key changes:
- CrosstermEventSource struct + impl blocks gated with
  #[cfg(feature = "crossterm-compat")]
- New HeadlessEventSource for test/headless programs that returns a
  fixed terminal size and never produces events
- HeadlessEventSource re-exported from runtime lib.rs
- Demo showcase and harness Cargo.toml updated for feature compatibility
- ftui facade crate adjusted for runtime feature re-exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,7 +52,9 @@ debug-render = []
 caps-probe = ["ftui-core/caps-probe"]
 # Use the native ftui-tty backend instead of Crossterm.
 native-backend = ["ftui-runtime/native-backend"]
-default = ["caps-probe"]
+# Legacy Crossterm backend (fallback when native-backend is disabled).
+crossterm-compat = ["ftui-runtime/crossterm-compat"]
+default = ["caps-probe", "native-backend"]
 # Enable test-support to expose test infrastructure (locks, guards) to integration tests
 test-support = []
